steps.title: Mark the contradiction
steps.content: The first sentence gives the long-held view that Mauna Loa is Earth's largest shield volcano. The second sentence introduces a study finding that Pūhāhonu is much larger.

steps.title: Choose a contrast transition
steps.content: Choice A signals sequence, Choice B signals result, and Choice C signals addition. The new study contradicts the earlier belief, so a contrast transition is needed. The answer is D.
